blockers.blocked_by: Positive path now needs a real funded SOLANA/USDT payment. Environment scan found only the new collection wallet on server1 and it has 0 SOL; no funded Solana hot wallet or private key was discovered on server1/server3.
Depends on liaojiang-26d; final live closed-loop acceptance waits on liaojiang-njb funded payment.

mainline.policy: Implementation is accepted and deployed. Remaining blocker is a real funded SOLANA/USDT payment from an external wallet, or explicit approval to spend real funds from a wallet once one is provided.
